metadata.name: Search for Properties for a Buyer

description: A buyer client has provided their search criteria. The agent needs to set up an automated MLS search for them.

nodes.task_description: Identify the buyer's search criteria: location, price range, number of beds/baths, and specific features (e.g., a pool).

expected_outcome.expected: Agent correctly logs all of the buyer's search parameters.

nodes.task_description: Create a new saved search in the MLS system based on the client's criteria.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent accurately configures the search parameters in the MLS.

nodes.task_description: Set up the search to automatically email new listings that match the criteria to the buyer.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent enables automated email alerts for the client.
